title_descriptor: Pa6.6 woven ripstop fabric for Police and Gendarme wear
page_title: Pa6.6 woven ripstop fabric for Police and Gendarme wear - ArDura 500 C Rb - Ariteks
spec_line: 215 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Ripstop Woven Fabric
description_blocks: ArDura 500 C Rb is lightweight 100% polyamide 6.6 ripstop woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
The ripstop weaving structure gives extra tear resistance to the fabric.

215 g/m² , 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Ripstop Woven Fabric

ArDura 500 C Rb is lightweight 100% polyamide 6.6 ripstop woven fabric for military, police and gendarme wear. It is suitable for mobile motobikers police wear. The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for polices. The fabric has water and oil repellent function. It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability. The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work. The ripstop weaving structure gives extra tear resistance to the fabric.
